entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: Kami Policy di “Jangan Track” Signals:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Perkhidmatan kami membolehkan anda menyiarkan, memaut, menyimpan, berkongsi, atau menyediakan maklumat, teks, grafik, video, atau bahan lain (“Kandungan”). Anda bertanggungjawab terhadap Kandungan yang anda siarkan, termasuk kesahan, kebolehpercayaan, dan kesesuaiannya. Dengan menyiarkan Kandungan, anda menyatakan bahawa Kandungan itu milik anda atau anda mempunyai hak untuk menggunakannya dan memberi kami lesen yang dinyatakan dalam Terma ini, serta bahawa siaran itu tidak melanggar hak privasi, publisiti, hak cipta, kontrak, atau hak pihak lain. Anda mengekalkan hak anda terhadap Kandungan yang anda hantar, tetapi memberi kami hak untuk menggunakan, mengubah suai, memaparkan, menghasilkan semula, dan mengedarkannya melalui Perkhidmatan. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) boleh memantau dan menyunting Kandungan pengguna, tetapi tidak wajib berbuat demikian. Kandungan dalam Perkhidmatan ialah milik syarikat atau digunakan dengan izin, dan tidak boleh diedarkan, diubah suai, dihantar, dimuat turun, disiarkan semula, disalin, atau digunakan untuk tujuan komersial atau keuntungan peribadi tanpa kebenaran bertulis kami terlebih dahulu.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.
entries.value: Perkhidmatan kami mungkin mengandungi pautan ke tapak lain yang tidak dikendalikan oleh kami. Jika anda mengklik pautan pihak ketiga, anda akan diarahkan ke tapak pihak ketiga tersebut. Kami amat mengesyorkan anda menyemak Dasar Privasi setiap tapak yang anda lawati. Kami tidak bertanggungjawab terhadap kandungan, dasar privasi, atau amalan mana-mana tapak atau perkhidmatan pihak ketiga.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to third party web sites or services that are not owned or controlled by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has no control over, and assumes no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third party web sites or services. We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites. For example, the outlined Terms of Use have been created using PolicyMaker.io, a free web application for generating high-quality legal documents. entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Ibu bapa ialah often trying untuk bantu tanpa taking lebih daripada. inspir gives keluarga awam mod itu jadikan pembelajaran behavior kelihatan: hints, soalan, jelaskan-back, ulang kaji, dan belajar planning.

entries.value: Pasport ke dunia sejarah

entries.source: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Tampal soalan, jawapan anda, dan jawapan yang dijangkakan jika ada. Rakan anda akan menerangkan sebabnya dan membantu anda mengelakkan kesilapan yang sama pada masa akan datang.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Makmal Falsafah

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Makmal Falsafah ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, dan other deep soalan melalui careful penaakulan.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Makmal Falsafah: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Philosophy Lab prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Makmal Falsafah

entries.source: philosophy tutor AI
entries.value: falsafah tutor AI

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: process plants use untuk jadikan food.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Pilih sebarang topik dan hadapi kuiz 10 soalan aneka pilihan yang fokus. Anda menjawab satu soalan pada satu masa, mendapat maklum balas segera, dan berakhir dengan skor serta ulasan.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Pilih sebarang topik dan berdebat secara bersemuka. Pilih pihak, terima cabaran, dan belajar untuk membina hujah yang lebih baik.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Sediakan soalan forum, balasan, rumusan dan permintaan susulan yang jelas untuk menjadikan perbincangan pelajar lebih bermanfaat.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Bersedia untuk peperiksaan

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Bersedia untuk peperiksaan dengan ingatan aktif

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Bersedia untuk sesi soal jawab lisan

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Sediakan untuk oral questioning.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Bersedia untuk temu duga sekolah, latihan amali, pekerjaan atau biasiswa dengan soalan dan maklum balas yang realistik.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Sediakan pelajar untuk oral exams melalui realistik questioning.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Sediakan ucapan, pembentangan, temu duga, atau peperiksaan lisan dengan gesaan, pemasaan, dan maklum balas tentang struktur.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Sediakan sumber pembelajaran untuk rakan sekelas atau kumpulan: ringkasan, pautan, nota, penjelasan, dan panduan penggunaan.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, dan exercises ialah strongest apabila pelajar knows topik sequence.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Present hujah, wait untuk rebuttal, kenal pasti lemah spots, dan strengthen pelajar's penaakulan.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Present bukti, tanya untuk decisions, reveal consequences, dan debrief principles.

entries.value: Utamakan tugasan

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Prioritize oleh urgency dan effort, break tasks down, dan update status.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Utamakan topik

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritize topik.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioritize, schedule, add practice dan ulang kaji, then adjust as progress changes.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, dan close dengan ulang kaji.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Privasi

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Dasar privasi

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Dasar Privasi

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Dasar privasi | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Peribadi tersimpan chat URLs bukan sitemap-listed dan bukan included dalam llms.txt, llms-full.txt, atau JSON AI Kandungan catalog.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Peribadi tutoring ialah powerful, tetapi ia bukan equally available. percuma awam Pembelajaran AI platform boleh bantu reduce itu access gap oleh giving more orang patient pertama place untuk belajar.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Peribadi tutoring ialah powerful, tetapi ia ialah unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI untuk widen access sambil keeping pelajar active: hints sebelum jawapan, soalan sebelum lectures, dan practice selepas explanation.

entries.source: Project Coach

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Pembimbing Projek ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Plan sekolah, creative, coding, atau peribadi project dengan scope, milestones, blockers, dan seterusnya actions.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Pembimbing Projek: panduan praktikal
